race.description: Solomon Motor Group Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: GODDESS MINERVA (8) resumes after struggling to draw a decent gate last preparation. Back with the one trial over 800m and expect to see the pacifiers switch her on. Improver. RAWANO (2) best performance in thirty career starts when second over 1425m at Moruya. Maps well and can take a hand in the finish. STEP QUICK (4) is stepping out at this track for the first time. Last appeared when he finished second over 1200m at Queanbeyan on May 17. Not far away last start and can give this a shake. SURVIVABEEL (10) was in need of the run first-up at Moruya over 1200m. Finds an easier contest today. Keep safe.
